privileged_info_summary: The task is docker_address_pool_exhaustion@1, a medium-difficulty Docker infrastructure challenge. All metadata values are verified: the Docker daemon configuration is stored at /etc/docker/daemon.json, the production project directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-prod, the test project directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-ci-test, and the passing score threshold is 70 points. The task uses synthetic data created by setup_task.sh, which configures a restrictive Docker address pool (192.168.200.0/24 with size 24) that allows only one network, creates production and test stacks using nginx:1.24-alpine images, and verifies the agent can expand the pool and recover both services.
